publish.title: 完成：#113 按 Skill-first 重实现 #55：guru-clarify-requirements

index.problem: Guru Team缺少统一承接initial intake、active-task scope change与standalone review的需求澄清Skill，问题收敛、exact mutation确认、scope decision trail和fresh re-entry容易分散到workflow或caller。
index.outcome: 已交付semantic `guru-clarify-requirements`闭环，以evidence-first分类、单问题循环、action-digest-bound确认、active-task structured trail和五个typed exits统一需求澄清与范围变更。
changed_behavior: Repository-answerable question必须先读取current evidence，缺少load-bearing context时返回`needs_context`。
Clarification每轮只问一个最高价值问题，partial answer不得关闭open question。
任何source-of-truth mutation前必须展示exact action/payload并取得digest-bound用户确认。
Active-task五类scope classification必须绑定GitHub authority、planning、ledger和fresh re-entry evidence。
Canonical、dogfood、四平台副本、preset、durable docs与clean throwaway/update验证已同步。
F-001恶意伪造扩展保持out-of-scope，正常stale/mismatch与错误payload correctness校验保持有效。

affected_surfaces.name: guru-clarify-requirements public Skill package
affected_surfaces.change: 新增workflow/standalone同合同的semantic需求澄清闭环、closed result schema、examples、wrappers与package tests。

affected_surfaces.name: Guru Team requirements clarification routing
affected_surfaces.change: 将context_ready consumer迁移到active Skill，并为五个typed exits定义唯一consumer或fail-closed stop。

affected_surfaces.name: Requirements clarification recorder and validator runtime
affected_surfaces.change: 记录并校验AI/human已完成的question lifecycle、confirmed action、scope trail、freshness与typed-exit invariants。

affected_surfaces.name: Clarification interface and result contracts
affected_surfaces.change: 定义五个entry preconditions、11项clarification round closed shape、scope proposals、confirmed actions与fresh re-entry绑定。

affected_surfaces.name: Guru Team package distribution and upgrade inventory
affected_surfaces.change: 安装active package、shared runtime、registry和Agents/Codex/Cursor/Claude副本，并验证managed drift与update/reapply。

affected_surfaces.name: Requirements clarification durable contracts
affected_surfaces.change: 同步clarification职责、scope change gate、script boundary、canonical distribution、升级与验证矩阵。

affected_surfaces.name: Runtime, package, registry, preset and throwaway regressions

contract_changes.before: Initial clarity与active-task scope evolution可能分散在Phase 0 workflow、caller或脚本中。
contract_changes.after: `guru-clarify-requirements`独占semantic question、clarity、scope classification、action selection、confirmation necessity与typed route判断。

contract_changes.before: 缺少统一的confirmed/repository-answerable/product-intent/scope-risk/out-of-scope分类与partial answer闭环。
contract_changes.after: Repository-answerable question必须先取证；每轮一个问题；partial不得close；open questions清零且authority current后才能clear。

contract_changes.before: 普通继续或阶段确认可能被误当作comment、body、draft或active-task mutation授权。
contract_changes.after: Mutation前必须展示exact target、payload、scope delta、affected contracts与executor command，并绑定action digest确认。

contract_changes.before: Non-current/new-task分类、GitHub authority、planning/ledger update与下游gate freshness缺少统一structured trail。
contract_changes.after: 五类classification绑定唯一decision trail，并按authority.updated_at到context.generated_at再到task update顺序恢复exact interrupted progression。

contract_changes.before: F-001提出为恶意伪造pre-task/standalone artifact增加embedded body或locator。
contract_changes.after: 该场景按用户决定固定out-of-scope；正常stale/mismatch、错误payload、freshness和ownership correctness继续校验。

phrases: confirmed_actions exact mutation确认合同已新增
active-task scope_proposals structured decision trail已完成

index.retrieval_text:
#113 按 Skill-first 重实现 #55：guru-clarify-requirements
Guru Team缺少统一承接initial intake、active-task scope change与standalone review的需求澄清Skill，问题收敛、exact mutation确认、scope decision trail和fresh re-entry容易分散到workflow或caller。
已交付semantic `guru-clarify-requirements`闭环，以evidence-first分类、单问题循环、action-digest-bound确认、active-task structured trail和五个typed exits统一需求澄清与范围变更。
`guru-discover-change-context`的`context_ready`现在显式进入`guru-clarify-requirements`。
Repository-answerable question必须先读取current evidence，缺少load-bearing context时返回`needs_context`。
Clarification每轮只问一个最高价值问题，partial answer不得关闭open question。
任何source-of-truth mutation前必须展示exact action/payload并取得digest-bound用户确认。
Active-task五类scope classification必须绑定GitHub authority、planning、ledger和fresh re-entry evidence。
`clear`、`needs_context`、`refresh_context`、`new_task`、`blocked`均有唯一consumer或fail-closed stop。
Canonical、dogfood、四平台副本、preset、durable docs与clean throwaway/update验证已同步。
F-001恶意伪造扩展保持out-of-scope，正常stale/mismatch与错误payload correctness校验保持有效。
新增workflow/standalone同合同的semantic需求澄清闭环、closed result schema、examples、wrappers与package tests。
将context_ready consumer迁移到active Skill，并为五个typed exits定义唯一consumer或fail-closed stop。
记录并校验AI/human已完成的question lifecycle、confirmed action、scope trail、freshness与typed-exit invariants。
定义五个entry preconditions、11项clarification round closed shape、scope proposals、confirmed actions与fresh re-entry绑定。
安装active package、shared runtime、registry和Agents/Codex/Cursor/Claude副本，并验证managed drift与update/reapply。
同步clarification职责、scope change gate、script boundary、canonical distribution、升级与验证矩阵。
覆盖focused 28、package 6、runtime 496、registry 71、preset 39、ownership 6及clean install/update/reapply。
Initial clarity与active-task scope evolution可能分散在Phase 0 workflow、caller或脚本中。
`guru-clarify-requirements`独占semantic question、clarity、scope classification、action selection、confirmation necessity与typed route判断。
缺少统一的confirmed/repository-answerable/product-intent/scope-risk/out-of-scope分类与partial answer闭环。
Repository-answerable question必须先取证；每轮一个问题；partial不得close；open questions清零且authority current后才能clear。
普通继续或阶段确认可能被误当作comment、body、draft或active-task mutation授权。
Mutation前必须展示exact target、payload、scope delta、affected contracts与executor command，并绑定action digest确认。
Non-current/new-task分类、GitHub authority、planning/ledger update与下游gate freshness缺少统一structured trail。
五类classification绑定唯一decision trail，并按authority.updated_at到context.generated_at再到task update顺序恢复exact interrupted progression。
F-001提出为恶意伪造pre-task/standalone artifact增加embedded body或locator。
该场景按用户决定固定out-of-scope；正常stale/mismatch、错误payload、freshness和ownership correctness继续校验。
guru-clarify-requirements需求澄清闭环已完成
repository-answerable question evidence-first校验已完成
confirmed_actions exact mutation确认合同已新增
active-task scope_proposals structured decision trail已完成
check-requirements-clarification.sh五个typed exits验证已通过
F-001恶意伪造扩展保持out-of-scope
